particulars.description: All the land and buildings on the south east side of wellingborough road and on the north west side of st edmunds road, northampton and registered under title number NN26956.

F/H property k/a land and buildings on the south east side of wellingborough road and on the north west side of st edmunds road northampton t/nos. NN26956 NN84247 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures).
